# clerk_jwt_template (Resource)

Manages a Clerk JWT template.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "clerk_jwt_template" "example" {
  name   = "my-custom-jwt"
  claims = jsonencode({
    email  = "{{user.primary_email_address}}"
    org_id = "{{org.id}}"
  })
  lifetime           = 60
  allowed_clock_skew = 5
  signing_algorithm  = "RS256"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `claims` (String) JSON string of custom claims for the JWT.
- `name` (String) Name of the JWT template.

### Optional

- `allowed_clock_skew` (Number) Allowed clock skew in seconds.
- `custom_signing_key` (Boolean) Whether to use a custom signing key.
- `lifetime` (Number) Token lifetime in seconds.
- `signing_algorithm` (String) Signing algorithm (e.g. RS256, HS256).
- `signing_key` (String, Sensitive) Custom signing key. Write-only: not returned by the API on reads.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the template was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the JWT template.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the template was last updated.
